title: PlanSpec
description: Declarative specification for a BDI plan in WellProdSim. Plans are sequences of primitive actions loaded from YAML files in the plans/ directory.

id.description: Unique snake_case identifier. Must match the plan_ref field in the GoalSpec that references this plan.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this plan does.

preconditions.description: MVEL2 boolean expressions evaluated against 'belief' context before executing steps. All must be true for the plan to start.

steps.description: Ordered sequence of primitive action steps.

on_timeout.description: Steps executed if any wait_for_event step times out.

on_failure.description: Steps executed if any step returns FAILURE.

id.description: Local step identifier, unique within this plan. Used in logs and debugging.

action.description: Name of a registered primitive action (must exist in ActionRegistry). Available actions: send_event, wait_for_event, update_belief, increment_belief, consume_resource, select_from_collection, emit_episode, emit_emotion, assert_fact, retract_fact, query_beliefs, publish_stream, request_llm, log_audit, conditional, parallel, repeat_until.

args.description: Arguments passed to the action. Keys and values are action-specific. String values may use {belief.key} or {bindings.varName} interpolation.

binds.description: Variable name to store the action result in the plan's binding context. Used by subsequent steps via {bindings.varName}.

condition.description: MVEL2 expression. If provided, this step is only executed when the condition evaluates to true.
